_comment: Per-agent DISPLAY NAME + AVATAR config (V2 #48). HOT-RELOADING: the server reads this live on each profile request (no restart, not baked into code) — edit a name or avatar filename here and it takes effect immediately, unless a user has set their own via the profile editor (a user override always wins). Avatars are filenames under promptgym/avatars/. Current theme: the Wizards' Tower (Isaac 2026-07-10 — the app is the first SkillWizard; roles are Wizards, not Wrights). Re-theme freely by editing this file + each persona's promptgym/<type>/CLAUDE.md voice.
